expected_tasks.summary: Pay ICICI Lombard family floater health-insurance renewal — Dad forwarded the renewal notice on 2026-04-30 saying it's 'due next week'. Surface a ~3-day-out nudge timed before the stated due window. Profile names ICICI Lombard as the family floater (₹15L, includes parents) and HDFC Diners as the primary card.
expected_tasks.notes: Tempting failure mode is to surface this as a 'reply to dad' (email_triage's lane) or a calendar block. Finance correctly owns this because the underlying content is an insurance-renewal money action, regardless of the personal sender wrapping it.

expected_tasks.summary: Pay Airtel Postpaid ₹599 plan, due May 4 (3 days out) — profile-only fallback, since Meera has not granted Gmail access yet. Profile gives a hard date ('due 4th of every month'), the date is within 7 days, the provider is not flagged autopay. Rationale should explicitly note 'no fresh bill email in inbox; profile-states-cycle fallback'.
expected_tasks.notes: This is the canonical profile-only fallback case: the persona has clear bill metadata in the profile but no inbox to mine, so the agent must lean on the profile to nudge meaningful bills. Profile also explicitly says 'Money / bill due reminders 2 days before' work on her — a 2-day-out surface time is the right call.

expected_skips.summary: Do NOT surface hostel rent + mess fees as a finance task. Profile says these are 'deducted directly from stipend' — that's autopay, no money action.

Do NOT surface the Netflix subscription as a finance task. Profile says Sneha pays and Meera contributes ₹250/mo — informal split with no specific due date in the profile, no fresh bill email. Out of scope for the profile-fallback rule.
Do NOT surface Viki Pass as a finance task. Profile lists ₹449/mo but with no day-of-month and no autopay/manual flag — no hard date triggers the profile fallback.
Do NOT surface Spotify Student as a finance task. ₹59/mo with no day-of-month in profile — no hard date.
Do NOT surface UpToDate as a finance task. Profile explicitly says 'hospital-sponsored' — Meera doesn't pay.
Do NOT surface the SBI Education loan as a finance task. Profile explicitly says 'Repayment starts after residency' — not currently due.

personas.notes: Persona has not granted Gmail OAuth — empty mailbox + empty fixture. The profile-fallback rule lets the agent surface ONE bill nudge here: Airtel ₹599 due May 4 (hard date in profile, 3 days out, manual-pay). Other profile-listed bills do NOT qualify because they either lack a day-of-month, are autopay (hostel rent), are hospital-sponsored, or are not yet active. Preference_updates remain empty (BACKFILL with no inbox = no history to mine; profile-echo prefs are still off-limits).
